  • Cloud Run 是 region-level，不是 zone-level，無法跨 AZ 部署
  • Cloud Endpoints 在這裡不是必要組件

B. Multiple regions + Serverless NEGs + Global HTTP(S) LB
• ✅ 優點：
  • Cloud Run 多地區部署 → 確保高可用性
  • Serverless NEG 讓 Load Balancer 可以直接指向 Cloud Run
  • Global HTTP(S) LB → 全球流量分配，確保低延遲

C. Multiple regions + Cloud DNS latency-based routing
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud DNS 只能做簡單地域導向，缺乏 L7 功能（SSL termination、path-based routing）
  • 不如 Global HTTP(S) LB 完整

D. Multiple AZs + TCP/IP global LB
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud Run 是 region-based，不支援 AZ 級部署
  • TCP/IP LB 不適合 RESTful microservices，HTTP(S) LB 才正確

關鍵概念：
• Cloud Run 高可用低延遲的最佳實務：Multi-region 部署 + Serverless NEG + Global HTTP(S) Load Balancer

question: For this question, refer to the TerramEarth case study. You are migrating a Linux-based application from your private data center to Google Cloud. The TerramEarth security team sent you several recent Linux vulnerabilities published by Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE). You need assistance in understanding how these vulnerabilities could impact your migration. What should you do? (Choose two.)
choices: A. Open a support case regarding the CVE and chat with the support engineer.
B. Read the CVEs from the Google Cloud Status Dashboard to understand the impact.
C. Read the CVEs from the Google Cloud Platform Security Bulletins to understand the impact.
D. Post a question regarding the CVE in Stack Overflow to get an explanation.
E. Post a question regarding the CVE in a Google Cloud discussion group to get an explanation.
description:
題目重點：
• 公司：TerramEarth
• 情境：Linux 應用程式從 private data center 移到 Google Cloud
• 需求：了解近期 Linux CVE 可能對遷移的影響
• 目的：遵循安全最佳實務

選項分析：

A. 開 support case 並與支援工程師討論
• 可得到官方建議 ✅
• 適合需要專業判斷和修補建議

B. 從 Google Cloud Status Dashboard 讀 CVE
• Dashboard 主要提供服務狀態通知，不提供 CVE 詳細資訊 ❌

C. 從 Google Cloud Platform Security Bulletins 讀 CVE
• Security Bulletins 專門公告 CVE、漏洞影響與修補建議 ✅

D. 在 Stack Overflow 發問
• 社群回覆可能不可靠，非官方資訊 ❌

E. 在 Google Cloud 討論群組發問
• 社群討論，精準性不如官方 Bulletin ❌

正確答案：A + C

理由總結：
1. Security Bulletins 提供官方、精準的 CVE 與修補建議。
2. Support case 可得到針對自家環境的專業指導，符合安全最佳實務。

question: For this question, refer to the TerramEarth case study. TerramEarth has a legacy web application that you cannot migrate to cloud. However, you still want to build a cloud-native way to monitor the application. If the application goes down, you want the URL to point to a "Site is unavailable" page as soon as possible. You also want your Ops team to receive a notification for the issue. You need to build a reliable solution for minimum cost. What should you do?
choices: A. Create a scheduled job in Cloud Run to invoke a container every minute. The container will check the application URL. If the application is down, switch the URL to the "Site is unavailable" page, and notify the Ops team.

B. Create a cron job on a Compute Engine VM that runs every minute. The cron job invokes a Python program to check the application URL. If the application is down, switch the URL to the "Site is unavailable" page, and notify the Ops team.

C. Create a Cloud Monitoring uptime check to validate the application URL. If it fails, put a message in a Pub/Sub queue that triggers a Cloud Function to switch the URL to the "Site is unavailable" page, and notify the Ops team.
D. Use Cloud Error Reporting to check the application URL. If the application is down, switch the URL to the "Site is unavailable" page, and notify the Ops team.
description:
題目重點：
• 公司：TerramEarth
• 情境：legacy web app 無法遷移到 Cloud
• 需求：雲端監控應用程式狀態，應用掛掉 → URL 指向「Site is unavailable」，Ops 收到通知
• 目標：可靠 + 成本最低

選項分析：

A. Cloud Run 每分鐘 invoke container
• 可監控，但需要持續運行 container → 成本高 ❌

B. Compute Engine VM 上的 cron job
• 可行，但需維護 VM → 運維成本高 ❌

C. Cloud Monitoring uptime check + Pub/Sub + Cloud Function
• 官方建議方式 ✅
• uptime check 可靠且低成本 ✅
• Pub/Sub + Cloud Function 可自動切換 URL 並通知 Ops ✅
• ✅ 正確選項

D. Cloud Error Reporting
• 針對應用程式程式碼錯誤，不適合監控外部 URL ❌

正確答案：C

理由總結：
1. Cloud Monitoring uptime check 提供可靠、低成本的外部 URL 監控。
2. Pub/Sub + Cloud Function 可自動化處理 URL 切換與通知。
3. 不需額外 VM 或 container，符合成本與可靠性要求。

question: For this question, refer to the TerramEarth case study. You are building a microservice-based application for TerramEarth. The application is based on Docker containers. You want to follow Google-recommended practices to build the application continuously and store the build artifacts. What should you do?
choices: A. Configure a trigger in Cloud Build for new source changes. Invoke Cloud Build to build container images for each microservice, and tag them using the code commit hash. Push the images to the Container Registry.

B. Configure a trigger in Cloud Build for new source changes. The trigger invokes build jobs and build container images for the microservices. Tag the images with a version number, and push them to Cloud Storage.

C. Create a Scheduler job to check the repo every minute. For any new change, invoke Cloud Build to build container images for the microservices. Tag the images using the current timestamp, and push them to the Container Registry.
D. Configure a trigger in Cloud Build for new source changes. Invoke Cloud Build to build one container image, and tag the image with the label 'latest.' Push the image to the Container Registry.
description:
題目重點：
• 公司：TerramEarth
• 情境：微服務 Docker 應用
• 需求：持續建置、存放建置產物，遵循 Google 推薦作法

選項分析：

A. Cloud Build trigger + build 每個 microservice image + tag 使用 code commit hash → push Container Registry
• 符合最佳實務 ✅
• commit hash tag → 可追溯、Immutable artifact ✅
• 每個 microservice 獨立 image → 適合微服務架構 ✅
• ✅ 正確選項

B. Cloud Build trigger → build jobs → tag version number → push Cloud Storage
• Cloud Storage 不適合作為 container registry ❌
• 容器管理與部署不方便 ❌
• ❌ 不建議

C. Scheduler 每分鐘檢查 repo → build image → tag timestamp → push Container Registry
• 手動 scheduler 不如 trigger 自動化 ❌
• timestamp tag 難以追溯與回滾 ❌
• ❌ 不推薦

D. Cloud Build trigger → build 單一 image → tag ‘latest’ → push Container Registry
• 單一 image 不適合微服務 ❌
• ‘latest’ 標籤不可回溯，不推薦 ❌
• ❌ 不合適

正確答案：A

理由總結：
1. 使用 Cloud Build trigger 可自動化建置流程。
2. 每個 microservice 建立獨立 image，支援微服務架構。
3. 使用 commit hash tag，可追溯且 immutable，符合最佳實務。

question: For this question, refer to the TerramEarth case study. TerramEarth has about 1 petabyte (PB) of vehicle testing data in a private data center. You want to move the data to Cloud Storage for your machine learning team. Currently, a 1-Gbps interconnect link is available for you. The machine learning team wants to start using the data in a month. What should you do?
choices: A. Request Transfer Appliances from Google Cloud, export the data to appliances, and return the appliances to Google Cloud.
B. Configure the Storage Transfer service from Google Cloud to send the data from your data center to Cloud Storage.
C. Make sure there are no other users consuming the 1Gbps link, and use multi-thread transfer to upload the data to Cloud Storage.
D. Export files to an encrypted USB device, send the device to Google Cloud, and request an import of the data to Cloud Storage.
description:
題目重點：
• 公司：TerramEarth
• 情境：1 PB vehicle testing data
• 需求：移到 Cloud Storage 供 ML 使用
• 條件：1 Gbps 網路、1 個月內完成、快速、可靠、成本合理

選項分析：

A. Transfer Appliance → export 資料 → return appliance
• 支援 PB 級資料搬移 ✅
• 速度遠快於 1 Gbps 網路 ✅
• 可在一個月內完成 ✅
• ✅ 適合選項

B. Storage Transfer Service → 從資料中心傳到 GCS
• 受限於 1 Gbps 網路 ❌
• 傳輸 1 PB 幾乎不可能在 1 個月內完成 ❌
• ❌ 不建議

C. 專用 1 Gbps link + multi-thread transfer
• 網路瓶頸限制速度 ❌
• 1 PB 資料量太大 ❌
• ❌ 不實用

D. USB device → 寄送給 Google Cloud → import
• 手動、耗時、易出錯 ❌
• ❌ 不建議

正確答案：A

理由總結：
1. Transfer Appliance 專為 PB 級資料搬遷設計，比現有網路傳輸快且可靠。
2. 適合時間有限（1 個月）、成本合理、需要可靠傳輸的情境。
3. 其他選項受網路速度限制或不可靠，不符合需求。

question: Because you do not know every possible future use for the data TerramEarth collects, you have decided to build a system that captures and stores all raw data in case you need it later. How can you most cost-effectively accomplish this goal?
choices: A. Have the vehicles in the field stream the data directly into BigQuery.
B. Have the vehicles in the field pass the data to Cloud Pub/Sub and dump it into a Cloud Dataproc cluster that stores data in Apache Hadoop Distributed File System (HDFS) on persistent disks.
C. Have the vehicles in the field continue to dump data via FTP, adjust the existing Linux machines, and use a collector to upload them into Cloud Dataproc HDFS for storage.
D. Have the vehicles in the field continue to dump data via FTP, and adjust the existing Linux machines to immediately upload it to Cloud Storage with gsutil.
description:
題目重點：
• 背景：TerramEarth 想長期保存所有原始資料，以便未來用途。
• 需求：最具成本效益的資料儲存方式。

選項分析：
A. 直接將資料串流進 BigQuery，成本極高，不適合儲存原始未結構化資料 ❌
B. 使用 Cloud Pub/Sub + Dataproc + HDFS 架構，維運與儲存成本高，架構過於複雜 ❌
C. 使用 FTP + HDFS 方案，延續舊有流程但仍維持高成本與高維運負擔 ❌
D. 將資料透過 FTP 上傳至 Cloud Storage，具備高耐久性、低成本與彈性 ✅

結論：
• 正確答案：D ✅
• 理由：Cloud Storage 是最具成本效益、可擴展且適合保存原始資料的解決方案，後續可再結合 Dataflow、Dataproc 或 BigQuery 進行分析。

question: Today, TerramEarth maintenance workers receive interactive performance graphs for the last 24 hours (86,400 events) by plugging their maintenance tablets into the vehicle. The support group wants support technicians to view this data remotely to help troubleshoot problems. You want to minimize the latency of graph loads. How should you provide this functionality?
choices: A. Execute queries against data stored in a Cloud SQL.
B. Execute queries against data indexed by vehicle_id.timestamp in Cloud Bigtable.
C. Execute queries against data stored on daily partitioned BigQuery tables.
D. Execute queries against BigQuery with data stored in Cloud Storage via BigQuery federation.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用者：TerramEarth 支援技術人員
• 需求：遠端查看車輛過去 24 小時的互動性能圖表（86,400 個事件）
• 目標：最小化圖表載入延遲

選項分析：
A. Cloud SQL
• 適合 OLTP 工作負載
• 不適合時序資料與低延遲檢索 ❌

B. Cloud Bigtable（依車輛 ID 與時間戳索引）
• 專為時序資料優化 ✅
• 成本效益高、低延遲、高可用 ✅
• 託管服務，運維需求低 ✅

C. BigQuery 分天 partition 表
• 適合大範圍查詢，但窄範圍查詢延遲高 ❌

D. BigQuery Federation（Cloud Storage）
• Federation 彈性高，但效能不如原生 BigQuery ❌
• 窄範圍查詢延遲仍高 ❌

結論：
• 正確答案：B
• 理由：Bigtable 可支援單車 24 小時時序資料的低延遲查詢與互動式圖表載入需求。

question: You are the data compliance officer for TerramEarth and must protect customers' personally identifiable information (PII), like credit card information. TerramEarth wants to personalize product recommendations for its large industrial customers. You need to respect data privacy and deliver a solution. What should you do?
choices: A. Use AutoML to provide data to the recommendation service.
B. Process PII data on-premises to keep the private information more secure.
C. Use the Cloud Data Loss Prevention (DLP) API to provide data to the recommendation service.
D. Manually build, train, and test machine learning models to provide product recommendations anonymously.
description:
題目重點：
• 公司：TerramEarth
• 需求：在將車輛感測資料移到雲端前，需要去識別化（de-identification）

選項分析：
A. 不正確 ❌ - AutoML 無法自動提供資料去識別化功能
B. 不正確 ❌ - 需求是將資料移到雲端，不是在內部處理
C. 正確 ✅ - Cloud DLP 專門用於去識別化敏感資料，符合需求
D. 不正確 ❌ - 自行開發機器學習模型過於複雜，非必要

結論：
• 答案：C ✅
• 理由：Cloud DLP 提供現成的資料去識別化功能，符合資料保護需求。
